raw_consumer_statement:
Barclays Bank issued an XXXX XXXX credit card. XXXX ID is XXXX for card ending in XXXX card was charged {$1200.00} for services not provided. The card was used to book a week long hotel stay in XXXX. The card was issued for XXXX which found a local hotel The hotel was unsatisfactory, unsafe, with open drug usage. We canceled the reservation after XXXX night and paid the merchant separately. We contacted Booking.com multiple times but they had, transferred the money to a foreign country. It landed in XXXX and XXXX didn't have the money to return. This is an outright theft of {$1200.00} for no services or product provided. 

Barclays Bank should have provided protection for this fraud. But they claim they were not " provided the true nature of the dispute. '' This is a lie. We discussed this with them in detail.This is a large amount of money that Barclays wants us to pay them for nothing.
